since_last: 29% of 86 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +0.71%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 29% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +1.08% · BTC +1.29% · Gold +0.03% · Nasdaq100 +2.48%. 29% of 86 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +0.71%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +0.71%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -0.86%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: DV is the standout at +5.52%
cards.body: Leaders: DV +5.52%, INTC +4.18%, MU +3.17%, SMCI +2.77%, PWR +2.24%. Laggards: DLR -4.33%, SPCX -4.05%, CHKP -3.50%, SAP -3.36%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -4.05% at $177.5
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -4.05% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
